CustomField.formula: CASE( Owner:User.Profile.Name , 'Scotia Bank Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'SPL Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'SPL Login Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'SDA Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'SDA Login Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'New SDA Login Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'Goeasy Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , 'Canadian Tire Community User', Owner:User.FirstName + ' ' + Owner:User.LastName , '')
CustomField.label: Insolvency Account Owner
